# v19.4 Field House route rebuild

Scope: Field House only. No new content or gameplay systems.

Changed:
- Rebuilt the Field House background around explicit routes from the QA plan.
- Replaced cluttered decoration with clear landmarks: exit, coach office, mat, recovery, gear, weights.
- Replaced Field House collision zones with visible-only collision.
- Rebuilt Field House interaction zones so recovery, coach, shop, mat, and exit are reachable without overlap.
- Preserved Phaser, deployment structure, saves, battles, recruiting, scouting, objectives, practice, menus, and Campus Quad.

Route checklist: static route/collision checks passed for start, coach, recovery, mat, gear/shop, and exit.
